title: cladostachys polysperma
intro: Cladostachys polysperma, also known as Thai jasmine or Thai starflower, is a type of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cladostachys polysperma include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing protection against oxidative stress. Cladostachys polysperma is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
